mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Excessively high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 237.5) signals central bank policy tightening, which increases discount rates and reduces equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high inflation signals.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payrolls (PAYEMS) indicates robust economic activity, which drives corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 70% of cases, or their correlation with SPX returns drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE < 5.5%) signals tight labor markets, which increases wage pressures and corporate costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances when UNRATE < 5.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST > 1000) indicate strong consumer confidence and demand, which drives equity market optimism and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 70% of cases when HOUST exceeds 1000.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real sales (RSAFS < 430,000) signals weak consumer spending, which reduces corporate revenues and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances despite declining RSAFS.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production (INDPRO < 103.5) indicates weakening manufacturing activity, which reduces corporate earnings and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances when INDPRO falls below 103.5.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1 > 15800) and real sales (RSAFS > 435,000) indicates strong aggregate demand, which drives equity market optimism and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 70% of cases, or their correlation with SPX returns drops below 0.20.
